heading: Definitions
label: 7574 Definitions
text: Terms used in this part (other than Administrator) shall have the same meaning as such terms have under .section 40102(a) of title 49
notes: CodificationIn text, “” substituted for “section 101 of the Federal Aviation Act of 1958” on authority of , , , the first section of which enacted subtitles II, III, and V to X of Title 49, Transportation.section 40102(a) of title 49Pub.
